fieldRegistry.label: Primary Reason For Home Health / Medical Necessity

fieldGroups.label: Medical Necessity And Homebound
fieldGroups.description: Narratives and evidence for home health need and homebound status.

fieldGroups.label: Diagnosis And Coding
fieldGroups.description: Diagnosis evidence, coding-sensitive rows, and escalation flags.

fieldGroups.label: Medications, Allergies, And Special Treatments
fieldGroups.description: Medication safety, allergies, injectables, and O0110 special treatments.

fieldGroups.label: Functional And Therapy Status
fieldGroups.description: GG/M functional scoring, therapy need, discipline frequency, and goals.

fieldGroups.label: Symptom And Body System Review
fieldGroups.description: Body-system review sections that QA checks for consistency and completeness.

fieldGroups.label: Risk And Safety Assessments
fieldGroups.description: Fall, wound, hospitalization, and safety-related risk tools.

fieldGroups.label: Care Plan And Coordination
fieldGroups.description: Plan-of-care orders, patient summary, skilled interventions, and care plan content.

fieldGroups.label: Supplementals And History
fieldGroups.description: Past medical history, caregiver support, living situation, immunizations, and supplementals.

fieldGroups.label: Low Priority Admin Reference
fieldGroups.description: Identity, agency, physician, and demographic reference values that should not dominate QA.

referralDashboardSections.label: Plan of Care and Physical Therapy Evaluation

warnings: Deterministic referral QA insights fallback was used.
Bedrock returned invalid referral QA insights output; deterministic fallback was used.

consistencyChecks.title: M1700/M1710 vs Mental Status selections
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents describe mental-status evidence as confusion and cognitive concerns, and the chart snapshot does not currently show corresponding mental-status selections.

consistencyChecks.title: B1000 vision impairment vs glasses selection
consistencyChecks.detail: The chart snapshot does not currently show a vision-related entry, so B1000 vision impairment and any glasses selection still require reconciliation from chart evidence.

consistencyChecks.title: Respiratory findings vs M1400 shortness of breath answer
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents describe respiratory support with pneumonia, hypoxia, oxygen use, and shortness of breath history. Chart respiratory status currently reads blank.

consistencyChecks.title: Functional M items vs GG0130 and GG0170 scores
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents support function with weakness, gait, transfer, and endurance limitations. Chart GG0130/GG0170 values currently read self-care=blank and mobility=blank.

consistencyChecks.title: Wound answers vs integumentary details and wound worksheet
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents support wound status with wound care needs and lower-extremity ulcer history. Chart wound/Norton support currently reads integumentary=blank and Norton=blank.

consistencyChecks.title: Pain presence vs J0510/J0520/J0530 logic
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents show pain-related support as pain medication and pain-management instructions. Chart pain narrative currently reads blank.

consistencyChecks.title: Depression diagnosis/documentation vs D0150 completion
consistencyChecks.detail: Referral documents support mood history with depression diagnosis and confusion-related documentation. Chart emotional or behavioral status currently reads blank.
